description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages build, test, review, staging, canary, production, and cleanup. In the build stage define a job named build that runs on any branch (only:branches), uses the docker:git Docker image and the docker:dind service, and sets the variable DOCKER_DRIVER to overlay2. The job executes three shell commands: docker build -t "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE/$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG:latest" --build-arg "APP_GITSLUG=$CI_COMMIT_SHA" ., then docker login -u "$CI_REGISTRY_USER" -p "$CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD" "$CI_REGISTRY", and finally docker push "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE/$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG:latest". The built image is pushed to the GitLab Container Registry under the path $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE/$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG:latest.
